column7: Who of this weeks candidates would you like to have a chat with
column8: Why do you think there is a fit?
Would love to understand how they approached scaling past the first 100 customers.
I am a full-stack engineer and have been looking for a growth-focused co-founder for months.
I have been building in this exact space and would love to compare notes on technical approaches.
I have domain expertise they seem to be looking for and vice versa.
I think we could collaborate on open-source tooling in this space.
